items.name: BaseRT
items.description: 6.4x faster than llama.cpp, 3.9x faster than MLX. BaseRT is the fastest LLM runtime on Apple Silicon. Install it with one command and run local models on your own device.

items.name: CitedSpy
items.description: Track your brand in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and More. CitedSpy helps brands track and improve their visibility in AI search. Monitor how often your company is mentioned, cited, and recommended across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI assistants. Discover citation gaps, benchmark competitors, and optimize your Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy so your brand gets recommended when buyers ask AI for solutions.

raw_data.tagline: Track your brand in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and More

items.name: Double
items.description: Your AI career agent that gets you hired. Double is your personal AI career agent. Just text it, and it manages your entire career: finding your roles, applying for you, growing and maintaining your network, and making recruiters chase after you.

raw_data.tagline: Your AI career agent that gets you hired

items.name: SocialKaptan
items.description: Grow on LinkedIn & Instagram without the busywork. SocialKaptan automates LinkedIn and Instagram engagement with AI-powered comments and scheduled posts. Runs locally on your desktop for safer, consistent B2B social growth.

raw_data.tagline: Grow on LinkedIn & Instagram without the busywork

items.name: Panguard.AI
items.description: Open-source malware scanner and runtime guard for AI agents. Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review. I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious. PanGuard vets a skill before you install it, scans what you already have, and blocks hijack attempts at runtime. Free, MIT, fully on-device. Powered by 768 open ATR rules, already merged into Microsoft, Cisco, MISP and OWASP tooling. One command: npm install -g panguard && pga up

raw_data.tagline: Open-source malware scanner and runtime guard for AI agents

items.name: Recume
items.description: AI that spots car scams before they cost you. Upload a photo of any car part. Get an instant AI diagnosis, repair cost estimate, and expert recommendations — for less than a cup of coffee.

raw_data.tagline: AI that spots car scams before they cost you

items.name: HeimWall
items.description: Catch secrets before they leak into Cursor & Claude. HeimWall catches leaked secrets, credentials, and PII the moment they're about to reach AI coding assistants like Cursor, Claude Code, and Copilot. A lightweight macOS app, fully on-device: 47 hand-written rules flag leaks in real time. Your prompts never leave your Mac. No content stored, no account, no signup. Free for individual engineers. Next up: a team dashboard showing security leads leak trends without exposing what anyone typed. Signal, not content. Design partners welcome.

raw_data.tagline: Catch secrets before they leak into Cursor & Claude

items.name: ArchiMind
items.description: ArchiMind analyzes a GitHub repository and produces. ArchiMind analyzes a GitHub repository and produces: chapter-wise architecture documentation, high-level and low-level Mermaid diagrams, conversational project summary, persistent history for authenticated users.

raw_data.tagline: ArchiMind analyzes a GitHub repository and produces

items.name: Träumli: Bedtime Stories
items.description: A new bedtime story every night, starring your kid. Every night, Träumli writes a new bedtime story starring your child, built from their name, their friends, and the worlds they love. Ready in seconds for you to read aloud. 3 free stories to start. No subscription, no ads, and I never use them to train AI.

raw_data.tagline: A new bedtime story every night, starring your kid

items.name: AI Personal Finance Assistant
items.description: AI budgeting and personal finance planner. Personal Finance Assistant is an AI-powered toolkit that helps you organize budgets, track expenses, plan savings, and answer everyday money questions. It runs entirely in your browser with no installation, subscriptions, or bank connections. Built with Claude AI, it's designed for students, professionals, freelancers, and anyone who wants a simpler way to manage personal finances.

items.name: ScorAxis
items.description: Know your ATS score before recruiters see your résumé. Upload your PDF résumé and get a 0–100 ATS compatibility score powered by Claude AI. ScorAxis combines deterministic rubric checks (contact info, sections, formatting, bullet usage) with LLM-powered analysis to surface the exact issues holding your application back - so you can fix them before a recruiter ever sees it.

raw_data.tagline: Know your ATS score before recruiters see your résumé

items.description: Building the Fabric of Future Intelligence. India's pioneering agentic AI company. Headquartered in Indore, we build autonomous AI agents, voice systems, domain LLMs, and automation workflows that actually ship.

raw_data.tagline: Building the Fabric of Future Intelligence

items.name: Reality Filter
items.description: Is that AI launch real, or just hype?. Every AI launch sounds revolutionary. Reality Filter cuts through it — paste any AI launch and get a straight verdict: worth trying now, watch later, too early, or mostly fog machine. Every verdict comes with real evidence: what's proven, what's missing, what named experts and real users actually say — not just the press release. Verdicts are dated and kept public, so if a call ages badly, it's on record. Free, no signup needed to see a verdict.

raw_data.tagline: Is that AI launch real, or just hype?

items.name: Klyve
items.description: Five AI agents turn a prompt into a finished launch video. Klyve turns a prompt into a finished motion graphics video — the kind you'd normally pay a motion designer $1k and two weeks for. Seven agents split the work: script, storyboard, animation, render. No After Effects, no keyframes, no back-and-forth with a freelancer.

raw_data.tagline: Five AI agents turn a prompt into a finished launch video

items.name: Sherlock AI
items.description: Where does this face appear?. Sherlock AI Face Search finds where a face appears across the public web. Upload a photo, get source links. Analysed in your browser; the photo is never uploaded.

raw_data.tagline: Where does this face appear?

items.name: Road Mates
items.description: A transformation network for people grinding alone. The biggest difference from other social platforms is our phase-matching. We don't throw everyone in one room. Take a developer road in Road Mates vs. a developer subreddit: we divide the journey into phases, and people within each phase match together — you don't even see content from people 10 levels ahead of you. Think of it as Duolingo's structure meeting Reddit's community — but phase-matched.

raw_data.tagline: A transformation network for people grinding alone

items.name: Agentinel
items.description: Stop AI agents from installing malicious packages.. Because your AI loves slopsquatting, Agentinel is a zero-cost, locally-run package guardrail for autonomous AI coding agents (like Claude Code and Cursor). It integrates directly at the hook level to intercept hallucinated and malicious npm packages before they execute, checking them against a 60,000+ threat database in under 2ms

raw_data.tagline: Stop AI agents from installing malicious packages.

items.name: PyTokenCalc
items.description: About Universal token counting for ANY LLM. . Universal token counting for ANY LLM. 20+ providers (cloud + local), custom models, pattern-based forward-compatibility, 99%+ accuracy. - Mullassery/PyTokenCalc

raw_data.tagline: About Universal token counting for ANY LLM.

items.name: PowerMap Pro
items.description: Your AI advisor for navigating workplace politics. Most workplace advice is generic. PowerMap isn't. Describe your situation. It asks focused questions to understand the people and dynamics involved, then delivers a structured analysis: what's happening, which influence tactics are being used, and exactly what to do — including what to say. It remembers the people you deal with and gets sharper over time. Built for the moments when generic advice isn't good enough.

raw_data.tagline: Your AI advisor for navigating workplace politics

items.name: Solid Forms
items.description: free typeform alternative with auto web UI matching feature. We built Solid Forms because standard form builders have gotten way too expensive and don’t solve basic data issues. What makes us unique: Auto UI Matching: Paste any URL to instantly generate a form styled perfectly to your brand assets. Adaptive AI Follow-ups: Stops boring 1-word survey responses by automatically prompting users to elaborate when answers are too short. Enjoy unlimited forms and responses on our $0 free tier, or upgrade to Pro for just $19/mo.

items.name: Soozo.ai
items.description: AI Creative Suite for Images, Ad Video & 3D Assets for Games. Soozo is an AI creative platform that helps businesses, marketers, and creators generate professional-quality ads, product visuals, social media creatives, images, and videos from simple prompts. Create branded content faster, maintain visual consistency, and go from idea to campaign in minutes instead of hours.

raw_data.tagline: AI Creative Suite for Images, Ad Video & 3D Assets for Games

items.name: Face Shape Detector
items.description: Discover your real face shape in seconds measured by AI.. Most people guess their face shape from a mirror or a random online quiz, but StarDoppel's Face Shape Detector replaces guesswork with actual measurement. The AI maps dozens of facial landmarks forehead width, cheekbone position, jaw angle, and total face length and classifies your face into one of six categories: oval, round, square, heart, diamond, or oblong. Along with your shape, you get personalized hairstyle, makeup, and eyewear recommendations tailored to your specific structure.

raw_data.tagline: Discover your real face shape in seconds measured by AI.

items.name: adris.tech
items.description: Your entire AI stack in one local Windows app. adris.tech replaces your entire AI stack with one Windows desktop app that runs locally. AI agents via Krew, trigger-based automation, code editor, local LLM runner, DNS protection, and content studio. Nothing goes to the cloud. Built for developers and founders tired of paying $100/month for 8 tools that don't talk to each other. One app. One price. Your machine does everything.
